label: feces
definitions: ['Portion of semisolid bodily waste discharged through the anus[MW,modified].']
description: Portion of semisolid bodily waste discharged through the anus[MW,modified].

label: oral cavity
definitions: ['Anatomical cavity at the start of the digestive tract that that is enclosed by the mouth. The boundaries and contents vary depending on the species. In vertebrates, the boundaries are the oral opening, the cheeks, the palate and (if present) the palatoglossal arch - if this is not present then the mouth and pharynx form the oropharyngeal cavity. The buccal cavity contains the teeth, tongue and palate (when present).']
description: Anatomical cavity at the start of the digestive tract that that is enclosed by the mouth. The boundaries and contents vary depending on the species. In vertebrates, the boundaries are the oral opening, the cheeks, the palate and (if present) the palatoglossal arch - if this is not present then the mouth and pharynx form the oropharyngeal cavity. The buccal cavity contains the teeth, tongue and palate (when present).

label: skin epidermis
definitions: ['The outer epithelial layer of the skin that is superficial to the dermis.']
description: The outer epithelial layer of the skin that is superficial to the dermis.

label: vagina
definitions: ['A fibromuscular tubular tract leading from the uterus to the exterior of the body in female placental mammals and marsupials, or to the cloaca in female birds, monotremes, and some reptiles[WP].']
description: A fibromuscular tubular tract leading from the uterus to the exterior of the body in female placental mammals and marsupials, or to the cloaca in female birds, monotremes, and some reptiles[WP].

label: nasal cavity
definitions: ['An anatomical cavity that is part of the olfactory apparatus. This includes the space bounded anteriorly by the nares and posteriorly by the choanae, when these structures are present.']
description: An anatomical cavity that is part of the olfactory apparatus. This includes the space bounded anteriorly by the nares and posteriorly by the choanae, when these structures are present.
synonyms: ['cavity of nose', 'nasal pit', 'olfactory cavity', 'cavitas nasalis', 'cavitas nasi', 'cavity of olfactory apparatus', 'cavum nasi', 'nasal canal', 'nasal conduit space', 'nasal fossa', 'olfactory chamber cavity', 'olfactory chamber', 'olfactory pit']

label: milk
definitions: ['An emulsion of fat globules within a fluid that is secreted by the mammary gland during lactation.']
description: An emulsion of fat globules within a fluid that is secreted by the mammary gland during lactation.
